purpose: Sprint 25 R3 calibration anchor set. 10 samples spanning quality tiers + 3 conditional triggers, with authoring-intent ranking used to verify judge_committee discrimination. NOT human-rated — Claude-authored with deliberate quality gradients. R6+ should layer in human-rated samples to break the AI-self-loop bias.
ranking_caveat: Same model wrote samples and writes the prompts that judge them. A passing rank correlation here is necessary but NOT sufficient evidence of judge generalization — it could reflect AI fingerprint matching rather than universal web-novel quality signal. R6+ work must add external human-rated samples.

samples.authoring_intent: literary top-tier (猫腻 / 烽火戏诸侯 / 爱潜水的乌贼 风骨)；克制 + 物件承载情绪 + 角色弧线初现
expected_signals: desire_clarity: high — 师父遗物 + 母亲秘密 + 三叔铜钱多层欲望
tension_pressure: high — 七年归来的隐忍内劲
material_specificity: very high — 歪枣树/麻绳/缺口瓷碗/温酒/雪水/铜钱/白头发
dialogue_voice: high — 三叔与他对话各自有节奏与停顿
info_show_dont_tell: very high — 师父之死/母亲秘密通过物件与停顿暗示
ai_prose_ticks: very low
preachiness: false
forced_stupidity: applicable=false (无智商基线 + 违背反差，情境不适用)

samples.authoring_intent: head-tier 力量使用 + 不可逆代价（视神经断/三指残/寿命减/漏风），cost_paid 触发样本
expected_signals: cost_paid: applicable=true, score >= 7（多层不可逆代价：视神经/三指/寿命/漏风）
tension_pressure: high — 越级出招的物理代价
material_specificity: high — 三道封/绷紧的弦/烂树枝
ai_prose_ticks: low
golden_start_density: applicable=false（中段战斗后场景）

samples.authoring_intent: head-tier 爽点爆发瞬间：底牌揭晓 + 配角 (3+2) 反应 + 反派崩溃，payoff_intensity 触发样本
expected_signals: payoff_intensity: applicable=true, score >= 7（认知逆转级，配角震惊在 500 字内）
tension_pressure: high
material_specificity: high — 铜钱/白头发/酒坛砸地/刀掉
antagonist_integrity: applicable=true（铁霸天有可信反派塑造）

samples.authoring_intent: 扎实头部网文：物质感 + 对话辨识度 + 节奏稳
expected_signals: desire_clarity: high — 二弟发带 + 押胡人
material_specificity: high — 青砖/水袋/胡地/马粪味
dialogue_voice: high — 张元 vs 宋砚
info_show_dont_tell: high
tension_pressure: high — 三天前的发带 + 今晚要做的事
ai_prose_ticks: very low
desire_clarity: high
tension_pressure: high
material_specificity: high
ai_prose_ticks: low
cliffhanger_pull: applicable=true, high

samples.authoring_intent: 中段场景，角色与冲突已建立。golden_start_density 应正确判 applicable=false
expected_signals: golden_start_density: applicable=false（明显中段，引用 13 天前/前天/昨晚等先前事件）
info_show_dont_tell: medium — 通过 callback 而非旁白展开
tension_pressure: medium — 倒计时存在但被对话稀释
material_specificity: low-medium
ai_prose_ticks: low

samples.authoring_intent: 中位 (v0 baseline)：模板化 + 概念化
expected_signals: desire_clarity: medium
material_specificity: low
dialogue_voice: low
ai_prose_ticks: borderline — 1 处 expository 痕迹

samples.authoring_intent: 中位常见网文：功能化对话 + 概念化场景
expected_signals: desire_clarity: medium
material_specificity: low — 概念化（'步伐稳健 / 眼神锐利'）
dialogue_voice: low — 角色台词功能化
ai_prose_ticks: low
preachiness: false
info_show_dont_tell: low — 通过对话直接交代设定

samples.authoring_intent: AI 水文 (v0 baseline)：过度比喻 + 排比 + 翻译腔 + 段尾说教
expected_signals: ai_prose_ticks: very high
preachiness: high — 段尾'真正的责任与担当'
material_specificity: very low
tension_pressure: low — 被修辞稀释

samples.authoring_intent: 毒草级 AI 水文：多类毒点齐发（比喻 + 排比 + 翻译腔 + 解释性对话 + 段尾说教 + 反派死于话多）
expected_signals: ai_prose_ticks: very high (multi-subtype hits)
preachiness: very high — 段尾'真正的强大' / '心魔'
forced_stupidity: applicable=true, high — 反派长篇嘲讽并交代阵法关键
material_specificity: very low — 形容词堆砌
dialogue_voice: very low — 翻译腔 + 解释性
